<!-- OML:VERSION:0.1.0 -->
# Oh-My-Link

Multi-agent orchestration plugin for Claude Code. Keyword triggers:

| Keyword | Mode | Description |
|---------|------|-------------|
| `start link` | Start Link | Full 7-phase pipeline for complex tasks |
| `start fast` | Start Fast | Lightweight mode for simple tasks |
| `cancel oml` | Cancel | Cancel active OML session |

Agents: Master, Scout, Fast-Scout, Architect, Worker, Reviewer, Explorer, Executor, Verifier, Code-Reviewer, Security-Reviewer, Test-Engineer.

Skills are in the plugin's `skills/` directory. Artifacts stored in `.oh-my-link/`.
<!-- OML:END -->
